zh.lifeSummary: John Thompson於大約1615年出生在英國。他於1641年之前與Dorothy結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1656年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文易亞斯特 哈文享年42歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Thompson于大约1615年出生在英国。他于1641年之前与Dorothy结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1656年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文易亞斯特 哈文享年42岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂。

nameMeanings.name: Thompson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name T(h)om(me) (see Thom ) + -son ‘son of Tom’. Thomson is usually the Scottish form, that with the intrusive -p- being English. Both forms are common in Ireland. The surname Thompson is also very common among African Americans.
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, and North German Thomsen and of its Swedish cognate Thomsson. Compare Thomson .

variants.name: Thomson
meanings: Scottish, English and northern Irish: variant of   Thompson  .
Scottish: sometimes an Anglicized form of Gaelic McThomas; see McTavish , McComish .
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, and North German   Thomsen  . Compare   Thompson  .

variants.name: Thom
meanings: Scottish and English: from the Middle English personal name T(h)om(me), a pet form of Thomas . In Scotland, Thom is also an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Thom, see McComb .
German: from the personal name Thom, a pet form of Thomas . This surname is also found in France.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 譚, see   Tan   1.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
On April 24, 1638, a company of five-hundred English Puritans led by the Reverend John Davenport and Theophilus Eaton, a wealthy London merchant, sailed into the harbor.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: John Thompson was born about 1615, in England. He married Dorothy before 1641. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1656, in East Haven, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 42, and was buried in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: John Thompson est né environ 1615, à Angleterre. Il a épousé Dorothy avant 1641. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1656, à East Haven, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

ja.lifeSummary: John Thompsonは約1615年にイギリスで生まれた。1641年以前にDorothyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1656年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンエアスト ヘイベンで42歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンニューヘイベン トウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Thompson(은)는 대략 1615년 영국에서 태어났다. 그는 1641년 이전 Dorothy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1656년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 이스트 하븐에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴하븐 타운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Thompson nasceu aproximadamente 1615, em Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Dorothy antes 1641. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1656, em East Haven, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: John Thompson родился около 1615 г. в местности Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Dorothy перед 1641 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1656 г. в местности эаст хавен, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности нюхавен тоун, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: John Thompson nació aproximadamente 1615, en Inglaterra. Se casó con Dorothy antes de 1641. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1656, en East Haven, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultado en Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.
